cards.heading: Cloud Architecture
cards.body: Right-sized AWS/GCP setups for early-stage teams. No over-engineering, no vendor lock-in.

cards.heading: CI/CD Pipelines
cards.body: GitHub Actions workflows that build, test, and deploy on every push. Zero-downtime deploys from day one.

cards.heading: Infrastructure as Code
cards.body: Terraform or Pulumi modules your team can own and extend. State management, secrets, environments.

cards.heading: Containers & Orchestration
cards.body: Docker, Fly.io, ECS, or lightweight Kubernetes. Matched to your scale and budget.
